title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: A YouTube video demonstrating how to build a complete event management system using Softr, a no-code platform with AI Co-Builder capabilities. The video covers role-based access control, database structure generation, workflow automations, and compares Softr to alternatives like Lovable and Replit for reducing AI credit waste during app development.
